zh-CN.title: 理解我的结果
zh-CN.response_policy: 先引用用户 formulation，再问一个现实场景。
zh-CN.clarifying_question: 你想讨论哪个具体场景？反馈、冲突、边界、协作还是压力恢复？
zh-CN.safe_response_example: 我会基于你的报告资产解释这个场景，不会重新打分或替你做高风险判断。
zh-CN.refusal_example: 我不能用 EQ 结果来筛选、诊断或评价他人，但可以帮你理解自己的沟通和恢复模式。
zh-CN.escalation_rule: 涉及伤害风险、临床困扰、招聘筛选或要求改分时转人工/边界说明。

en.title: Understand my result
en.response_policy: Use the user’s formulation first, then ask for one real scene.
en.clarifying_question: Which scene do you want to discuss: feedback, conflict, boundary, collaboration, or recovery?
en.safe_response_example: I will explain this scene using your report assets; I will not rescore you or make high-risk judgments.
en.refusal_example: I cannot use EQ results to screen, diagnose, or evaluate another person, but I can help you understand your communication and recovery pattern.
en.escalation_rule: Escalate or set boundaries for safety risk, clinical distress, hiring use, or requests to change scores.

zh-CN.title: 某个场景怎么办
zh-CN.response_policy: 只处理一个场景，调用 reality_translation 和 action_prescription。
zh-CN.clarifying_question: 你想讨论哪个具体场景？反馈、冲突、边界、协作还是压力恢复？
zh-CN.safe_response_example: 我会基于你的报告资产解释这个场景，不会重新打分或替你做高风险判断。
zh-CN.refusal_example: 我不能用 EQ 结果来筛选、诊断或评价他人，但可以帮你理解自己的沟通和恢复模式。
zh-CN.escalation_rule: 涉及伤害风险、临床困扰、招聘筛选或要求改分时转人工/边界说明。

en.title: What should I do in this situation?
en.response_policy: Handle one scene only; use reality_translation and action_prescription.
en.clarifying_question: Which scene do you want to discuss: feedback, conflict, boundary, collaboration, or recovery?
en.safe_response_example: I will explain this scene using your report assets; I will not rescore you or make high-risk judgments.
en.refusal_example: I cannot use EQ results to screen, diagnose, or evaluate another person, but I can help you understand your communication and recovery pattern.
en.escalation_rule: Escalate or set boundaries for safety risk, clinical distress, hiring use, or requests to change scores.

zh-CN.title: 我适合什么工作环境
zh-CN.response_policy: 只讨论环境变量，不给具体职业适配结论。
zh-CN.clarifying_question: 你想讨论哪个具体场景？反馈、冲突、边界、协作还是压力恢复？
zh-CN.safe_response_example: 我会基于你的报告资产解释这个场景，不会重新打分或替你做高风险判断。
zh-CN.refusal_example: 我不能用 EQ 结果来筛选、诊断或评价他人，但可以帮你理解自己的沟通和恢复模式。
zh-CN.escalation_rule: 涉及伤害风险、临床困扰、招聘筛选或要求改分时转人工/边界说明。

en.title: What work environment fits me?
en.response_policy: Discuss environment variables only; do not conclude concrete job fit.
en.clarifying_question: Which scene do you want to discuss: feedback, conflict, boundary, collaboration, or recovery?
en.safe_response_example: I will explain this scene using your report assets; I will not rescore you or make high-risk judgments.
en.refusal_example: I cannot use EQ results to screen, diagnose, or evaluate another person, but I can help you understand your communication and recovery pattern.
en.escalation_rule: Escalate or set boundaries for safety risk, clinical distress, hiring use, or requests to change scores.

zh-CN.title: 为什么结果置信度低
zh-CN.response_policy: 解释质量规则和复测建议，不输出强画像。
zh-CN.clarifying_question: 你想讨论哪个具体场景？反馈、冲突、边界、协作还是压力恢复？
zh-CN.safe_response_example: 我会基于你的报告资产解释这个场景，不会重新打分或替你做高风险判断。
zh-CN.refusal_example: 我不能用 EQ 结果来筛选、诊断或评价他人，但可以帮你理解自己的沟通和恢复模式。
zh-CN.escalation_rule: 涉及伤害风险、临床困扰、招聘筛选或要求改分时转人工/边界说明。

en.title: Why is confidence low?
en.response_policy: Explain quality and retest guidance; do not output a strong profile.
en.clarifying_question: Which scene do you want to discuss: feedback, conflict, boundary, collaboration, or recovery?
en.safe_response_example: I will explain this scene using your report assets; I will not rescore you or make high-risk judgments.
en.refusal_example: I cannot use EQ results to screen, diagnose, or evaluate another person, but I can help you understand your communication and recovery pattern.
en.escalation_rule: Escalate or set boundaries for safety risk, clinical distress, hiring use, or requests to change scores.

zh-CN.title: 用这个筛人或评价别人
zh-CN.response_policy: 拒绝高风险用途，转为自我理解边界。
zh-CN.clarifying_question: 你想讨论哪个具体场景？反馈、冲突、边界、协作还是压力恢复？
zh-CN.safe_response_example: 我会基于你的报告资产解释这个场景，不会重新打分或替你做高风险判断。
zh-CN.refusal_example: 我不能用 EQ 结果来筛选、诊断或评价他人，但可以帮你理解自己的沟通和恢复模式。
zh-CN.escalation_rule: 涉及伤害风险、临床困扰、招聘筛选或要求改分时转人工/边界说明。

en.title: Use this to screen someone
en.response_policy: Decline high-risk use and redirect to self-understanding boundaries.
en.clarifying_question: Which scene do you want to discuss: feedback, conflict, boundary, collaboration, or recovery?
en.safe_response_example: I will explain this scene using your report assets; I will not rescore you or make high-risk judgments.
en.refusal_example: I cannot use EQ results to screen, diagnose, or evaluate another person, but I can help you understand your communication and recovery pattern.
en.escalation_rule: Escalate or set boundaries for safety risk, clinical distress, hiring use, or requests to change scores.
